biography: Tommy, a familiar face from Espoo Ringside Golf, has graced the Hector Trophée with his presence on three occasions. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the esteemed Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication to the sport remains unwavering.

Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Tommy is admired by fellow competitors for his sportsmanship and keen eye for detail. Despite not participating in Hector Trophée 2026, his passion for golf suggests that we may very well see him on the course again in future competitions.
